args: $candidates = @("$env:ProgramFiles\Git\bin\bash.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}\Git\bin\bash.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\Git\bin\bash.exe"); $bash = $candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $bash) { Write-Host 'ERROR: Git Bash not found. Install Git for Windows: https://git-scm.com/download/win' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }; & $bash '${workspaceFolder}/install-hooks.sh'; exit $LASTEXITCODE
